activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static Material UI surface data for a B2B renewal risk review, using only the raw brief, sample case, and adapter context.

surface.heading: Northstar Labs renewal review
surface.status: Source brief only; activity not reviewed

selected.request: Renewal risk review before the account planning meeting.

info.label: Usage trend
info.value: Down 28 percent over the last two reporting periods

info.label: Champion change
info.value: Primary champion left the account last month

info.label: Evidence gap
info.value: Procurement timeline is missing before escalation

evidence: Usage dropped 28 percent over the last two reporting periods.
Primary champion left the account last month.
Procurement timeline is missing before escalation.
surface.policy: Executive escalation is appropriate when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear; missing procurement dates should be resolved before committing a save plan.
actions: Start a save plan after confirming procurement timing.
Escalate to an executive sponsor if renewal timing and sponsor risk are confirmed.
Wait for stronger usage evidence if the procurement timeline remains unclear.
surface.primary_action: Confirm procurement timeline before committing the save plan.

handoff.title: Northstar Labs renewal handoff
handoff.reason: Champion change, declining usage, and missing procurement timing create renewal risk.
handoff.action: Resolve the procurement timeline, then choose save plan or executive escalation.
